title: Dayjs slot boundary regression
description: A project-owned semantic review case for scheduling boundary bugs seen in benchmark-style TypeScript diffs.

expectedFindings.semanticSummary: Strict equality compares distinct Dayjs object references, so equal instants are not detected; use a value comparison such as isSame
Slot end is derived from slotStartTime instead of slotEndTime, collapsing the window end to the start minute
